name: restaurant-white-label-template
description: White-label restaurant website and admin panel

scripts.check: node --check website-server.js && node --check admin-server.js && node --check site-store.js && node --check server-common.js && node --check media-library/library.js && node --check seller-jobs/jobs.js && node --check app.js && node --check admin.js
scripts.predeploy: npm run build:public && npm run check && npm run smoke
